codeReview.summary: The commit only updates guidance/docs and edits an existing synthesis artifact; it does not harden the user-testing-flow-validator finalization path itself, so required behavior is still unenforced.

issues.description: The feature requires runtime enforcement that missing flow report writes fail validation with diagnostics, but this change only adds documentation guidance. No validator/finalization implementation was changed, so silent-success behavior is not actually prevented.

Adding `flowReports` to a historical synthesis artifact is not an end-to-end hardening fix and can mask the original persistence gap. This does not verify that future successful runs always persist required flow report JSON artifacts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned skill (`switcher-integration-worker`) is mismatched for this infra validator-hardening feature, and the worker transcript shows prolonged discovery/confusion instead of targeted validator implementation work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature skillName is `switcher-integration-worker` in mission features.json; transcript skeleton for session 3684d083-0155-4470-940d-d10c64a72744 includes repeated searches for user-testing-validator location and no validator-code edits.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff claims `followedProcedure: true`, but required procedure evidence from the skill's handoff-discipline section is missing from `verification.commandsRun`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md` requires context-read evidence in `verification.commandsRun` for `followedProcedure=true`; handoff 2026-04-10T17-41-50-899Z lists only commit and flow-file existence commands.

summary: Review failed: expected validator-finalization hardening was not implemented. The diff adds process guidance and mutates an existing synthesis artifact, but does not enforce report-persistence checks in the finalization path nor provide end-to-end proof that success now depends on required flow report writes.
